evidence: FGAP-044 (B1) list-tools Pi tool — commit 06c5619. Wraps SDK-native pi.getAllTools()/getActiveTools() (ExtensionAPI) via closure over the extension-factory pi; returns {tools:[{name,description,parameters,sourceInfo}],active,total,activeCount} JSON via truncateHead. Pi-tool-ONLY (deliberate DEC-0019/0020 deviation: runtime introspection — no library fn, no CLI twin; orchestrator already served by grep/skills/status). Verified DEC-0018: build/check/test green (pi-context 528 [+4] / 152 / 157 / 829, 0 fail). Runtime demonstration = 4 mock-pi tests invoking the REAL registered list-tools execute through the factory closure against controlled getAllTools/getActiveTools stubs (proves registration + closure-reach + JSON composition; no library to tsx-eval; pi -p is user .pi/). Adversarial: empty getAllTools → empty no-crash; surfaces description+parameters (not just names) + sourceInfo. skills regen → list-tools in SKILL.md. captureTools mock extended back-compat. EXCLUDES label/promptSnippet (ToolInfo Pick). Companion description-readiness audit filed as FGAP-085 (kept out of B1).
